title: Randomizer Mod
description: Adds a few new customizable Randomizer-Mods to the game
body:
# Randomizer Mod
This mod introduces a wide range of randomizer-based mechanics that fundamentally change gameplay through persistent and configurable randomness.
It is designed to create unpredictable challenges and enhance replayability.
## This Mod includes:

## Features
- Randomized block drops
- Randomized mob drops
- Randomized crafting results
- Randomized mob sounds
- Randomized player sizes
- Random enchantments applied on block break
- Random status effects applied to the player

All core systems are built to be persistent and can be individually reset or adjusted at any time.

## Configuration

Most features can be fully configured and controlled via commands:

```
/randomizerBlock reset

/randomizerCrafting reset

/randomizerEffect interval "ticks"

/randomizer maxLevel "1-255"

/randomizerMob reset

/RandomizerSize interval "ticks"

/randomizerSound reset
```
This allows flexible customization depending on the type of challenge or gameplay experience you want to create.

### Utility Systems

In addition to randomizer mechanics, the mod includes several utility features:

### Backpack System

A portable inventory accessible via command.

```
/bp

/bp "Player"
```
### Ender Chest Access

Access your Ender Chest — or, with permissions, other players' inventories.
```
/ec 

/ec "Player"
```
### Timer System

A fully customizable timer for challenges, events, or speedruns.

```
/timer start          --- Starts stopwatch

/timer pause          --- pause timer

/timer reset          --- resets timer

/timer set "seconds"  --- starts countdown
```
_note: when you want to switch between timers, you have to reset_ 

## **GUI**
The mod features are toggeled trught a GUI that can be opened using the Right Shift key.
This GUI is only available if the mod is installed on the client.

_When playing on a server, installing the mod on the client is not required, especially if you are not an admin, because all core functions must be activated via an administrator._

_to make sure everything works set up the mod features while in **creative** (op is needed)_



**The mod is designed to be highly configurable and is well suited for use in combination with other challenge-based mods.**
